The Problem
The Hobby Is Broken.

You already know it. You've felt it every time you got burned, outbid, or got a card that looked nothing like the listing.

The Big Marketplace

Scroll Forever. Still Get Burned.

Double-digit fees. No real authentication. Dispute a fake and spend a month fighting support. Built to sell everything — which means it protects nothing.

The Grading Industry

Three Brands. One Owner.

The top three grading companies are owned by the same private equity group — controlling ~80% of the market. You're not choosing between competitors. You're choosing between labels on the same shelf.

Every Marketplace

Supply First. You Wait.

Every platform waits for a seller to decide to list. Your grail might be in someone's binder right now — and no platform on earth can tell them you want it.

The Pricing Tools

Yesterday's Price. Not Today's.

Historical comps tell you what sold last quarter. They don't tell you what five serious collectors are willing to pay right now. That's not a market. That's an archive.

There Is A Better Way

Demand First. Always.

GrailISO flips the entire model. You post what you want. The card finds you. Verified, graded, protected — and delivered like the trophy it is.

Community Catalog
Build The Largest
Card Directory Ever Built.

We're building the most complete visual card catalog in the hobby — and every card image you upload earns you free ISO Credits. Your collection, your knowledge, your work. You get paid for it.

📸

Upload Card Images

Photograph the front and back of any card in your collection. High resolution. Any condition. Every parallel. We want them all.

✅

We Verify & Catalog

Every upload is reviewed and matched to the card catalog. Accepted images become the official visual reference for that card on GrailISO — seen by every collector on the platform.

💰

You Earn Free Credits + Free Grading

Every accepted card image earns you ISO Credits — the platform currency worth $1 each. High-volume contributors also earn free ISO/GRADING credits — submit your card for full verification and grading at zero cost. The more you build the catalog, the more you get back. No cap. No limit.

🏆

Top Contributors Get More

The collectors who build the catalog get recognized. Top contributors earn bonus credits, early access to new features, and a permanent Community Builder badge on their profile.

20,000+ cards in catalog today
Help us get to 1,000,000.

Every set. Every year. Every parallel. The most complete visual card catalog in the hobby starts with collectors who care about it as much as we do.

Join & Start Uploading
Free credits for every accepted image
ISO/GRADING Technology
The Most Transparent
Grading System Ever Built.

Every other grading company hands you a number and tells you to trust them. GrailISO shows you exactly how we got there — AI analysis, professional review, and a public grading scale that anyone can read.

🤖
AI Analysis First

Every card is scanned at high resolution and analyzed by our grading AI. Surface wear, print defects, centering deviation, corner sharpness, and edge integrity are all measured precisely — in milliseconds, with zero subjectivity.

👁️
Professional Review

A certified GrailISO grader reviews every AI result before a grade is issued. They can confirm, adjust, or flag for re-scan. The final grade is always human-approved — AI speeds up the process, a professional signs off on it.

📖
Public Grading Scale

Our grading rubric is published in full. Every sub-category weight, every definition, every edge case — open to the public. You know exactly how your card will be evaluated before you submit it. No black box. Ever.

The ISOGrade Scale
1 — 1000.
Not 1 to 10.

Traditional grading compresses the entire spectrum of card condition into 10 points. A PSA 9 could be a weak 9 or a strong 9 — you can't tell. ISOGrade gives you 1,000 points of precision. The difference between an 890 and a 950 is visible. Documented. Explained.

Sub-Category Weights
Surface
35%
Edges
25%
Corners
20%
Centering
20%
Vintage cards (pre-1979) receive a dual score: era-adjusted + universal. Both are shown on your report.
Digital Blemish Mapping
Click Any Hotspot.
See Exactly Why.

Every card we grade gets a 3D blemish map. Every flaw is pinned to its exact location on the card. Click the hotspot — see the defect, its severity, and the exact grade impact. No mystery. No guessing.

🤖 AI Analyzed · ✓ Human Approved
Alteration Risk: LOW
Three-Tier Alteration Risk System
We Report Evidence. We Don't Accuse.

GrailISO never declares a card "Altered." We document what we found, assign a risk tier, and let the evidence speak. Every collector deserves transparency — not a verdict they can't appeal.

LOW RISK

No evidence of alteration detected across all scanned surfaces, edges, and corners. Card appears consistent with natural wear patterns for its age and grade.

ELEVATED RISK

One or more surface anomalies detected that are inconsistent with natural wear. Evidence documented in the full report. Professional review flagged.

HIGH RISK

Multiple anomalies consistent with known alteration patterns. Full evidence report provided. Escrow held pending buyer review. GrailISO reports — never accuses.

The Process
From Want List to Display Case

One platform. No negotiation. Full protection.

01
🎯
Buyer · Step 1

Post Your ISO

Name the exact card — set, parallel, grade, condition. Set the price you'll pay. As specific as you want. There is no negotiation. You set the demand. Sellers either meet your price or they don't. That is the entire model.

02
🔔
Platform · Step 2

Sellers Get Notified

Owners with that exact card — even buried in private collections never listed anywhere — get automatically alerted. Supply that was invisible yesterday finds you today. They respond anonymously. You review their offer and approve or pass.

03
🔒
Buyer · Step 3

Deal Locked In

You approve the offer. Funds move immediately into GrailISO escrow — not a dollar released to the seller until everything checks out. GrailISO ships a prepaid prep kit to the seller. The clock starts.

Secure Escrow Active
04
🔬
ISO/GRADING Hub · Step 4

Verified. Graded. No Exceptions.

The card arrives at our verification hub and enters the ISO/GRADING process. Trimming, corner alterations, surface manipulation — all checked before a single dollar moves. We 3D scan the card, map every blemish, assign sub-grades for centering, corners, edges, and surface, and document the full chain of custody. There is no black box. You see exactly what we found and exactly how we graded it.

No more waiting for a card in a postal envelope with zero visibility. Every ISO/GRADING shipment ships with RFID tracking embedded in the packaging plus full UPS/FedEx carrier tracking provided to the buyer. Real-time location from the moment it leaves our hub. You want your card fast — we want your card safe.

ISO/GRADING Process Active
Chain of Custody Begins
05
🏆
Buyer · Step 5

The Rip You Earned

Your grail doesn't arrive in a bubble mailer. It arrives sealed in a GrailISO pack — the same feeling as the day it was pulled. You rip it. It's yours. That moment — the one you hunted for — belongs to you. Not a transaction. A trophy.

Your Grail. Your Rip.
Why GrailISO
Built Different

Every other platform starts with supply. We start with demand.

🎯

Demand-First Discovery

Post what you want. Sellers with that exact card get notified automatically — even if it's buried in a private collection never listed anywhere.

🔬

Real Authentication

Not a photo review. Every card passes through our ISO/GRADING verification hub. Trimmed cards, altered corners, and condition misrepresentation never reach your hands.

📈

Live Price Intelligence

Not what it sold for last quarter. Active buyer demand — what serious collectors are willing to pay right now. The only number that matters.

🛡️

End-to-End Protection

Secure escrow. Insured shipping. Full chain of custody. Nobody gets paid until everything checks out. That's not a feature — that's the whole point.

🏅

ISO/GRADING Pipeline

Full blemish mapping, sub-grade breakdown, and chain of custody. No black box. You see exactly what we found before your card ships.

🎁

The Rip Experience

Your grail arrives sealed in a GrailISO pack. You rip it open. That moment — the one you hunted for — belongs to you. Not a bubble mailer. A trophy.

The Slash System
One Platform. Every Tool.

GrailISO isn't just a marketplace. It's a full product suite built for every stage of the card lifecycle.

GRAIL/ISO

ISO/RFID
RFID chip in every GrailISO slab. Tap any smartphone to verify grade, fingerprint, and full provenance instantly.
In Development
ISO/SLAB LAB
8 colors × 3 finishes. Live 3D preview before you order. Your grail deserves better than generic clear plastic.

Market Intelligence
Real Demand,
Real Prices.

Every other pricing tool is a rearview mirror — historical sales from last month. That's not a market. That's an archive.

GrailISO captures live buyer demand. See exactly what collectors are willing to pay today — the most accurate price discovery tool the hobby has ever had.

Subscription tiers for collectors, dealers, and investors give you data no one else has.
